mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_measurement WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY measure_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_measurement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_measurement WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_measurement WHERE deleted = 0 AND evaluation = #{eval}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_measurement (measure_date, zone_name, point_name, measure_type, measure_value, unit, standard_value, device, measurer, evaluation, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{measureDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{zoneName}, #{pointName}, #{measureType}, #{measureValue}, #{unit}, #{standardValue}, #{device}, #{measurer}, #{evaluation}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_measurement SET measure_date = #{measureDate,jdbcType=DATE}, zone_name = #{zoneName}, point_name = #{pointName}, measure_type = #{measureType}, measure_value = #{measureValue}, unit = #{unit}, standard_value = #{standardValue}, device = #{device}, measurer = #{measurer}, evaluation = #{evaluation}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_measurement SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
